content: 2025 state-of-the-art active learning memory agents can be improved by adding an episodic memory transformer gate that prunes low-information query candidates by linking new exploratory stimuli to past surprising episodes, turning active learning’s sample selection into a curiosity-driven memory-aware process. This gate would automatically prioritize queries that resolve uncertainty from mismatches between current predictions and stored episodic context that previously triggered strong learning updates.
source_topics: active learning memory agent SOTA deep 2025
